CREATE TABLE test_xor (id INT, value_a BOOLEAN, value_b BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO test_xor VALUES (1, true, true);
INSERT INTO test_xor VALUES (2, true, false);
INSERT INTO test_xor VALUES (3, false, true);
INSERT INTO test_xor VALUES (4, false, false);
SELECT id, value_a, value_b, XOR(value_a, value_b) AS result FROM test_xor;
SELECT id FROM test_xor WHERE XOR(value_a, value_b) = true;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_xor WHERE XOR(value_a, value_b);
SELECT (SELECT XOR(value_a, value_b) FROM test_xor WHERE id = 1) AS xor_result;
CREATE TABLE test_xor_nested (id INT, column_x BOOLEAN, column_y BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO test_xor_nested VALUES (1, true, false);
INSERT INTO test_xor_nested VALUES (2, false, true);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_xor AS t1 JOIN test_xor_nested AS t2 ON XOR(t1.value_a, t2.column_x);
SELECT XOR((SELECT value_a FROM test_xor WHERE id = 1), (SELECT value_b FROM test_xor WHERE id = 2)) AS combined_xor;
CREATE TABLE related_table (related_id INT, foreign_key_id INT);
SELECT rt.related_id, XOR(tx.value_a, tx.value_b) AS xor_result FROM related_table AS rt JOIN test_xor AS tx ON rt.foreign_key_id = tx.id WHERE XOR(tx.value_a, tx.value_b) = true;
SELECT DISTINCT value_a, value_b, XOR(value_a, value_b) AS xor_result FROM test_xor GROUP BY value_a, value_b HAVING XOR(value_a, value_b) = false;
